basics.name: Vadim Nicolai
basics.label: Senior Full Stack Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 12+ years of experience building scalable web applications using React, TypeScript, Go, and Rust. Expert in modern frontend architectures, microservices, GraphQL APIs, and performance-critical systems. Delivering 5 AI-powered projects with multi-model LLM orchestration, agentic pipelines, RAG search, eval-driven development, and production observability. Domain expertise in E-commerce, FinTech, AI/ML, and enterprise SaaS.
basics.keySkills: React • TypeScript • JavaScript • Next.js • Node.js • Go • Rust • GraphQL • Apollo • REST API • Microservices • gRPC • AWS • Cloudflare • MongoDB • DynamoDB • Docker • CI/CD • Jest • Git • AI/LLM Orchestration

work.name: Vitrifi
work.summary:
• Architected micro-frontend portal using Go microservices with gRPC and OpenAPI, integrating shared React components across multiple teams.
  • Led API migration from REST to GraphQL, implementing Apollo Server in Go and Apollo Client in React, reducing over-fetching and improving performance.
  • Drove frontend architecture and technical leadership across teams, establishing design patterns and enforcing quality through PR reviews.
  • Migrated monorepo from npm to PNPM with Turborepo caching, reducing CI/CD build times.
  • Integration testing strategy with Jest and React Testing Library, automated in CI/CD.
  • Tech stack: Go, Echo, gRPC, GraphQL, Apollo Server, OpenAPI, React, TypeScript, Apollo Client, React Query, Ant Design, Turborepo, PNPM, MongoDB, Jest, React Testing Library

work.name: Wunderman Thompson Commerce
work.summary:
• Built e-commerce shopping cart and checkout components using React and TypeScript.
  • SSR with Next.js for SEO and page load performance.
  • Reusable UI components with Styled Components and atomic design.
  • Payment gateway integration (Stripe, PayPal) with PCI compliance.
  • Tech stack: React 17, Next.js 10, TypeScript, Styled Components, Jest, React Testing Library

work.name: Event Espresso
work.summary:
• Modernized WordPress plugin admin with React and GraphQL for Event Smart SaaS platform.
  • 50+ merged PRs to open-source repositories.
  • Established SASS/BEM architecture and component library patterns.
  • Unit testing (Jest) and E2E testing (Playwright).
  • Tech stack: React 16, React Apollo, GraphQL, WPGraphQL, WordPress, PHP, MySQL, Jest, Playwright

work.name: Modus Create, Inc
work.summary:
• Project: AARP Money Map — Financial planning platform for AARP, millions of users.
  • UI library with 40+ React components, WCAG 2.1 AA accessible.
  • CI/CD with Bitbucket Pipelines, Sentry, SonarQube, and AWS CodePipeline.
  • Serverless APIs using AWS Lambda, API Gateway, and DynamoDB.
  • Tech stack: React 16.8, Hooks, Context API, React Apollo, Serverless Framework, GraphQL, DynamoDB, AWS Lambda

work.name: Atomate
work.summary:
• Project: Travlrr — React component library with HOCs, render props, and compound components.
  • Auth system with AWS Lambda, Auth0, JWT, and MongoDB.
  • RESTful APIs with Node.js and Express.js (JSON:API spec).
  • Code reviews and testing (Jest, Enzyme), reducing production bugs by 30%.
  • Code splitting, lazy loading, tree shaking — 45% smaller bundle.
  • Tech stack: React 16, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, AWS Lambda, Auth0, Redux, Webpack

work.name: DevelopmentAID
work.summary:
• Built full-stack event planning application with Node.js, Express.js, Angular, and MongoDB.
  • Implemented JWT authentication, optimized MongoDB queries and database indexing.

work.name: Endava, ProPeople (FFW Agency), Best4u Group
work.summary:
• Built responsive frontends for enterprise clients including Stanford University (Drupal multisite), .NET applications, and WordPress platforms.
  • Developed custom themes, integrated RESTful APIs, and delivered pixel-perfect implementations using HTML5, CSS3, SASS, and jQuery.

aiProjects.name: Agentic Lead Gen
aiProjects.description: Autonomous B2B lead generation platform with a 5-agent agentic pipeline (Discovery Scout → Enrichment Specialist → Contact Hunter + QA Auditor → Outreach Composer), GraphQL API backed by Neon PostgreSQL, LLM-powered company enrichment, MLX local contact scoring at 4,618 embeddings/sec, and LangSmith observability.
highlights: 5-agent pipeline: Discovery → Enrichment → Contact Hunter + QA Auditor (parallel) → Outreach Composer with plan-approval gate.
Type-safe GraphQL API (Apollo Server 5, DataLoader N+1 prevention, Drizzle ORM + Neon PostgreSQL, TypeScript codegen).
LLM enrichment: tier classification, tech stack detection, ATS discovery via multi-model routing.
3 competing-hypotheses agents — cross-reading findings — producing GO/NO-GO verdicts.
MLX scoring at 4,618 embeddings/sec on M1; local email gen via Qwen2.5-3B; eval enforcer with LangSmith tracing.
Candle Rust ML inference for contact scoring with INT8 quantization.
Eval-driven strategy enforcer validates every prompt/model change against 80% accuracy bar.

aiProjects.name: Agentic Healthcare
aiProjects.description: Clinical biomarker trajectory analysis across derived metrics, AI-driven risk classification with cosine embedding similarity, pgvector search, server actions, automated accuracy evals with Braintrust experiment tracking.
highlights: Biomarker trajectory analysis across 7 clinical metrics with abnormal detection and velocity computation.
Risk classification via cosine similarity against 1024-dim Qwen embeddings across 7 tables.
7 server actions with 15 test cases covering diverse metabolic profiles.
Braintrust autoevals: Factuality and Relevance scorers, model version experiment tracking.
Supabase + pgvector with Row Level Security, Drizzle ORM, medication and diagnosis management.

aiProjects.name: Knowledge
aiProjects.description: Knowledge graph with pgvector cosine similarity search, Bayesian mastery tracing per user per concept, automated quality evals with DeepEval RAG triad, LangGraph multi-agent fan-out/fan-in editorial pipeline.
highlights: Knowledge graph with 6 relationship types, pgvector cosine similarity at 1024 dimensions.
Per-user Bayesian knowledge tracing (p_mastery, p_transit, p_slip, p_guess per concept), novice → expert classification.
DeepEval: Coherence, Factual Grounding, Completeness at 0.7 threshold; RAG triad evaluation.
LangGraph 6-agent fan-out/fan-in editorial pipeline with multi-round revision loops, DeepSeek R1 + OpenAI.
Real-time streaming chat with thread-scoped persistence, 17-table Drizzle schema, pgvector embeddings.

aiProjects.name: ResearchThera.com
aiProjects.description: Multi-agent orchestration with LLM quality gating, clinical research ingestion from 7 sources, RAG-powered vector search, runtime prompt versioning with distributed tracing, automated quality evals with Harbor containerized harness.
highlights: Agentic workflow (6-20 agents): NLP normalization → 7-source ingestion → OpenAlex enrichment → LLM quality gate → RAG.
DeepSeek-as-judge evaluation scorer; 3-threshold gating filtering unsupported clinical claims.
Prompt versioning with runtime registry, distributed tracing, per-model cost tracking, A/B eval across LangGraph workers.
Serverless TTS: RAG-based chunking, streaming audio to Cloudflare R2 via background tasks.
Harbor eval harness: containerized trials across 6-20 non-deterministic agents with standardized grader format.

aiProjects.name: Law Adversarial
aiProjects.description: 6-agent adversarial debate pipeline with citation verification and fabrication detection, jurisdiction precedent analysis, red-teaming and safety evals with Promptfoo YAML suites and DeepTeam attack methods.
highlights: 6-agent adversarial pipeline: Attacker, Defender, Judge, citation-verifier, jurisdiction-expert, brief-rewriter.
Citation verification and fabrication detection with chain-of-thought audit trails.
Jurisdiction-specific legal precedent hierarchy mapping, multi-jurisdiction comparison.
Real-time SSE streaming with structured per-agent logging.
Promptfoo: 8 YAML eval suites, LLM-as-judge rubrics; DeepTeam safety red-teaming via 7 attack methods.

volunteer.summary:
• Contributed 100+ pull requests to core trading engine and exchange connectivity modules in Rust and Python.
  • Built production exchange adapters for dYdX v4 and Hyperliquid with REST, WebSocket, gRPC, authentication, rate limiting, and execution clients.
  • Enhanced OKX and Kraken integrations with historical data support, pagination, and WebSocket reliability improvements.
  • Implemented high-performance technical indicators in Rust with Python/Cython parity, improving PnL calculations and monetary precision.
